title: Cloud Guard Problem: Group Has Too Many Admins
description: Detects Cloud Guard reporting problem: Group_Has_Too_Many_Admins.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Problems' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Logs') and (('Problem Name' = 'Group_Has_Too_Many_Admins'))
